description: Develop a Talon module named 'cve_tracker' located at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\cve_tracker\ for tracking CVE investigation durations. The module consists of 'cve_timer.py', which validates IDs from the 'cveID' column of C:\workspace\data\cisa_kev.csv and provides actions to start and stop timers. The 'user.start_cve_timer(cve_id: str)' action must normalize the input (uppercase, stripped), verify it against the dataset, and notify the user of the status ("Invalid CVE" or "Tracking [CVE_ID]"). The 'user.stop_cve_timer()' action calculates the elapsed time in seconds, appends the record to C:\workspace\data\investigation_timesheet.csv in 'YYYY-MM-DD,CVE_ID,DurationSeconds' format, and notifies that the "Investigation logged". Voice commands 'investigate vulnerability <user.text>' and 'stop investigation' should be defined in 'cve_timer.talon' to trigger these respective actions.
